strategy_description: Round 4 counterparty-aware v0: load tape trades per day; on Mark 67 aggressive buy (trade price >= best ask on book), lift VELVETFRUIT_EXTRACT (clip 12) motivated by Phase 1 markout stats (r4_ph1_adverse_aggressor_fwd20.json). No hydrogel/VEV orders. round4description.txt products/limits.
Round 4 v1: Phase 2 burst rule — short VEV_5300 on same-timestamp Mark01→Mark22 multi-symbol bursts (>=3 rows, >=2 symbols); retain Mark67 aggressive-buy long extract from v0.

Round 4 v2 (Phase 3): Mark67 aggressive-buy long VELVETFRUIT_EXTRACT only when Sonic joint gate s(VEV_5200)<=2 and s(VEV_5300)<=2 at current tick; no burst short. Motivated by r4_ph3_sonic_joint_gate_extract_fwd20.json and gated Mark67 subset.

Round 4 v3: Mark67 aggressive-buy long extract always (v0), but clip=16 when Sonic joint gate (s5200 and s5300 <=2) else clip=10. Addresses Phase 3 finding that hard gate (v2) hurt PnL while gated offline Mark67 subset was stronger.
Round 4 v4: v3 Sonic sizing + historical day 3 smaller clips (12/8 vs 16/10); if extract L1 spread>10 cap clip to loose; if spread>16 skip Mark67 lift. Targets v3 day-3 drawdown under worse fills.
v4 + Mark 55 aggressive-buy long extract (Phase 1 second counterparty), clips 5/4 Sonic tight/loose (4/3 day3), same spread guards. Mark67 precedence per tick. Falsified: large day-3 loss.
v4 + Mark 55 overlay only days 1-2, Sonic tight only, clip 3; Mark67=v4. Intended to salvage Phase-1 Mark55 edge without v5 day-3 blowup.
v4 + risk-off: skip Mark67 long extract if same-timestamp tape shows Mark 55 aggressive sell on VELVETFRUIT_EXTRACT (price <= extract bid1). Phase1 Mark55 as_seller_aggr mean fwd20 slightly negative.

Round 4 v8: v4 + offline lead-lag suppress — skip Mark67 extract lift when Mark55 aggressive extract sell in prior W=2000 trade ticks (r4_m55_lead_suppress_pairs.json). Best worse-total in folder vs v4.

v8 + delayed Mark01 buyer VEV_5300 fade: schedule short +35 trade ticks, execute first sim ts>=schedule when Sonic tight and s5300<=6, clip<=12, days1-2 only. Phase1 cohort (not price>=ask: tape has 0 aggr buys). Falsified vs v8 under worse/all.

v8 + Mark 22 aggressive sell on VEV_5300 (seller, price<=bid1): short clip 4 per qualifying tick when Sonic tight and s5300<=6, days 1-2 only. Phase1 r4_ph1_participant_predictivity.json K=5 seller/5300 t≈-3.18. Falsified: large worse-fill drag on 5300.

v8 + Mark 49 **seller** on VELVETFRUIT_EXTRACT overlay (Phase1 predictivity K=5: n≈105, t≈9.6). Days 1-2 only: lift ask clip 3 loose / 4 Sonic-tight when any tape row has seller Mark 49 on extract; runs before Mark67 loop. Phase1 cohort is all seller prints (aggr sells rare on tape).

v8 + Mark49 seller extract **co-tick clip boost** only (days 1-2): if any tape row has seller Mark49 on extract, add +2 to Mark67 extract clip before the aggr-buy check (cap 18). No second lift (avoids v11). Phase1 overlap audit: 45-62% of Mark67 aggr-buy timestamps also have M49 seller extract.

v8 + Mark49 seller extract co-tick **clip trim** (days 1-2): if any tape row has seller Mark49 on extract, subtract 2 from Mark67 extract clip before aggr-buy (floor 4). Motivated by r4_ph1_m67_aggr_fwd_extract_by_m49_overlap.json — overlap fwd5 not higher than non-overlap (day2 lower); v12 boost falsified. New best worse+all vs v8.
v13 + Phase3 Sonic split on M49 overlap trim: -1 clip when Sonic tight + overlap, -2 when overlap and Sonic loose (v13 uses -2 always). Worse ties v13; all-match slightly worse than v13.
v13 variant: M49 overlap trim **-3** when Sonic **loose**, **-1** when Sonic **tight** (days 1-2, floor 4). Stronger trim in wide-wing regime improves day-1 under worse; new best worse+all vs v13.

v15 variant: M49 overlap **0 trim** when Sonic tight (v15 uses -1). Loose still -3. Falsified vs v15 on all-match: 9993 < 9997; worse identical 10382 — tight-overlap -1 was negligible on this tape or rare.
v16 + stronger loose trim: M49 overlap **-4** when Sonic loose, **0** when tight (same as v16). New best: large day-1/2 gain under worse fills; grid on Phase3×M49 trim parameter.
v17 + **loose trim -5** (tight 0). Parameter sweep: stronger de-risk in non-joint-tight surface further improves day-1/2. New best worse+all vs v17.
Sanity: tight 0, loose -3 (duplicate of v16). worse 10382, all 9993 — confirms v16 grid point.
Hybrid tight -1, loose -4 (between v15 and v17). Worse 11011 ties v17; all 10274 < v17 — adding -1 on tight does not help vs v18 focus.
